title: 安田記念の後に・故に、怪物

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (I'll win! I will defeat Oguri!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text: You can do it, Oguriiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan C
text_block_list.text: Go, Oguri! Wiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: GRAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (She's speeding up now?! How?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I thought Oguri had already pushed herself to
her limit...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (But she sped up again in front of the stands!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
That was incredible, Ogurin! You're sooo
coooool!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan C
text_block_list.text:
That was classic Ogurin right at the end there! I
can't wait for her next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooo! Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after the race ends, the audience continues
crying out Oguri Cap's name. No matter how long
we wait, the cheering keeps on going.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was good enough... I thought I could
surpass Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But in the end, the audience was calling her name!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Why? Why can't I catch up to her?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What is it that separates us? What am I lacking?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
What do you think makes her so spectacular?
What does she have that I don't?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
How does she capture the hearts of everyone like
this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Why does Oguri Cap get the support she does?
Setting her background aside and just focusing on
her running, I'd have to say...
choice_data_list:
It's the second wind she gets just as she seems
down for the count.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after expending all of her energy, Oguri Cap
is able to speed up again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that there are moments in Oguri's
running where it seems her spirit had been
rekindled, so much so that it's impossible to look
away.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're right... Oguri sped up again when we were
in front of the stands.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, it was the same at the
Mainichi Hai as well...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(This is it! All of my opponents have fallen behind
me!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan
text_block_list.text: You got this, Oguriiiii! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: She made a comeback in front of the stands...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No doubt the audience feels like their cheers
revive Oguri Cap just in time to take the win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In fact, that may very well be the case.
choice_data_list:
I'm sure Oguri Cap herself also feels invigorated
when she hears their cheers.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's right! She sped up right after they
started cheering!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh... But that means...
choice_data_list: Oguri Cap gains strength from her supporters.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And they're all from your fans... I have to say I
was surprised at the amount.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I guess they heard about my injury somehow.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Isn't that nice? I feel better already.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: The support of my fans always gives me strength.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri said the same thing once herself. She said
she gets strength from her everyone cheering for
her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Who would've thought it'd be literal strength...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If that's true, and if her popularity continues to
grow at the rate it has been...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: There's no limit to how strong she'll get!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Does that mean I have no chance of beating her?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I may have found an obsession, but the difference
between us is staggering.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: If I just had some kind of edge...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oguri's fans are her weapon. If I had something
like that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One thing comes immediately to mind.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
THE STRONGEEEST! THEEERE! IIIIIS!
RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki tapped into a hidden font of
power at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can let her obsession drive her the way it
did back then and run with her raw feelings
exposed... she just might have a chance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe Yaeno Muteki's true strength lies in her
fiery competitive spirit. It's clear igniting that is
the key to unlocking her true potential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But like any fire, it can burn out of control if
given too much fuel. That's why we've been using
water still to control it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been able to let that hungry fire within her
breathe even more since she found her obsession,
but if she could unleash it completely, all at
once...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Letting her emotions run rampant, though, comes
with the risk of losing control.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not have realized it herself, but it looked
as if Yaeno had an easy time today. I think we
have the wide track at Tokyo Racecourse to
thank for that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I believe she's always hyper-aware of the other
runners around her, so she must have felt quite at
ease on such a wide track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's always taking great care not to run wild, so
I've been hesitant to teach her how to fully
unleash her competitive spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without those restraints, she may win—but it
comes at great risk of going wild.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And if she were to run wild, there is a possibility
that she may never regain control, rendering all
her progress pointless.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That might be the scariest possible outcome for
Yaeno Muteki.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which means... we can't go down that road.
choice_data_list:
I can't think of one right now, but we'll figure
something out.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If it were easy to find a perfect
technique, everyone would already have one.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
All I can do is continue to hone my skills day in
and day out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not be able to see the light at the end of
the tunnel quite yet, but I know that if she works
as hard as she always has, she'll be able to defeat
Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All we can do is believe and keep moving
forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On our way home, I suddenly realize we haven't
decided on our next goal.
choice_data_list: What do you want to do for your next race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suggest the Takarazuka Kinen, though I know
it'll be difficult to run another race so soon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taking her goal of defeating great opponents
and getting the attention of the fans into
consideration, the Grand Prix may be a good
choice.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm. You're right. A Grand Prix would be a great
opportunity for me, considering the number of
strong opponents they draw. By all means, I'd like
to compete.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I wonder who else will be there...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo... City... Oh, it looks like Inari is running
as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One—a racer who enjoyed a spectacular run
in Oi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She showed everyone her potential for national
races at the spring Tenno Sho, and it seems she's
already gaining great acclaim.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The appearance of a new talent is always cause
for celebration in the racing world.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yet... It also reminds us of the march of time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But I'm racing so that the past will not be
forgotten.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I will bring the past back to life at the Takarazuka
Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's cry resounds in the crimson
evening sky. But in this sharp, still air, I can't tell
whose spirit is roused, hers, or my own.
